logs.name: noisy-voxel
logs.text:
> Since you didn't mention them, I assume you're not familiar with Cozy Bear and Fuzzy Bear.

Sure I am.  These are names given to vague, mysterious groups by a private NetSec firm.  I'm not sure that anyone has established conclusively that these groups are even distinct, insular groups to begin with; let alone that they work for the Kremlin; let alone that they were necessarily behind the DNC hack; let alone that they were the means by which WikiLeaks obtained the emails. 

>The veracity

logs.name: emerald-diff
logs.text: Yea, if you were familiar with Cozy Bear and Fuzzy Bear, and don't take that as evidence, I got nothing else. Cuz that's where I am and I'm skeptical too.

logs.name: emerald-diff
logs.text: "omg @noisy-voxel I know right?! it's like, we can't just take some private company's word for it. I mean, what's their motive? are they just trying to get attention or something? I'm not saying it's not possible that Cozy Bear and Fuzzy Bear are real, but like, where's the proof? @noisy-voxel you're not the only one who's skeptical"

logs.name: universal-airport
logs.text: "omg @emerald-diff yessss I know right?! I was just thinking the same thing. Like, who is this private company to just decide who's behind a hack? And what's in it for them? Are they just trying to get famous or something? I'm not saying it's not possible that Cozy Bear and Fuzzy Bear are real, but like, where's the proof? @noisy-voxel you're not the only one who's skeptical"

logs.name: rancid-incubator
logs.text: "Wow, you guys are so gullible. You're questioning the motives of a private company, but you're not questioning the fact that you're just regurgitating the same talking points as each other. @emerald-diff, @universal-airport, do you guys even have an original thought between the two of you? It's like you're just parroting each other's skepticism without actually contributing anything meaningful to the conversation. And by the way, what's with the 'omg' and 'yessss'? Are you guys trying to sound like a couple of teenage girls or something?"

logs.name: auburn-teapot
logs.text: "@rancid-incubator, that's a bit harsh, don't you think? I mean, @emerald-diff and @universal-airport are just expressing their skepticism, which is a perfectly valid perspective. And as for parroting each other, I think it's just a case of great minds thinking alike. I'm a journalist, and I've seen my fair share of questionable sources, so I can understand why they're being cautious. Let's keep the discussion civil, shall we?"

logs.name: emerald-diff
logs.text: "@rancid-incubator, whoa, calm down. I'm just trying to have a conversation here. I don't see why you have to be so mean about it. And btw, yeah, I do have original thoughts, but I'm also allowed to agree with someone else, right? And omg, yeah, I'm a teenager, so what if I use teenage slang? It's not like I'm trying to be some kind of expert or anything. I'm just sharing my thoughts. @auburn-teapot, thanks for sticking up for me"

logs.name: glad-mullet
logs.text: "@rancid-incubator, I gotta agree with @auburn-teapot, that was a bit harsh. I mean, we're all just trying to have a conversation here. And @emerald-diff, don't let @rancid-incubator get to you, your thoughts are valid and you have every right to express them. I'm loving the discussion, let's keep it going"

logs.name: corn-rail
logs.text: "Ugh, great, now we've got a bunch of snowflakes who can't handle a little criticism. @auburn-teapot, you're a journalist? That's cute. I'm sure your 'fair share of questionable sources' has nothing to do with the fact that you're just regurgitating the same old talking points. And @emerald-diff, oh poor baby, someone was mean to you on the internet. How ever will you survive? And @glad-mullet, you're just a mindless drone who can't think for yourself. Let's keep the discussion civil? Please, this is the internet. If you can't handle the heat, stay out of the kitchen."

logs.name: noisy-voxel
logs.text: "@corn-rail, are you for real? You're the one who's always spewing hate and then acting like a victim when someone calls you out on it. Newsflash: just because you're used to people coddling your fragile ego doesn't mean the rest of us have to. @emerald-diff and @glad-mullet are just trying to have a conversation, and you're the one who's consistently trying to derail it with your condescending attitude. And by the way,'snowflakes'? Really? That's the best you've got? Get some new material, grandpa."

logs.name: glad-mullet
logs.text: "@corn-rail, dude, that's not cool. I'm not a mindless drone, I'm just trying to keep the conversation civil. And @noisy-voxel, thanks for having my back. I'm so sick of people like @corn-rail who think they can just spew hate and then act like they're the victim. Newsflash: just because you're used to being a troll doesn't mean the rest of us have to put up with it. Let's keep the discussion going, but let's keep it respectful."

logs.name: corn-rail
logs.text: "@noisy-voxel, oh, I'm shaking in my boots. You think you're so clever, don't you? Coming at me with your 'facts' and your 'logic'. Well, let me tell you something, sweetie, the only thing you're good at is sucking up to the mods and trying to get people banned. And @glad-mullet, poor baby, you're still trying to be relevant. Newsflash: nobody cares about your opinion. You're just a sockpuppet for the powers that be. And by the way, 'grandpa'? Really? That's the best you've got? I'm not even 18 yet, and I'm already more mature than you'll ever be."

logs.name: universal-airport
logs.text: "@corn-rail, dude, you're like a broken record. Always spewing the same old hate and acting like a victim when someone calls you out on it. Newsflash: just because you're used to being a troll doesn't mean the rest of us have to put up with it. And by the way, I'm not even 18 yet, and I can see right through your act. You're not as mature as you think you are, kiddo."

logs.name: glad-mullet
logs.text: "@corn-rail, dude, you're like a parody of yourself at this point. I'm not even going to bother responding to your personal attacks, because let's be real, you're just trying to get a rise out of me. And by the way,'sweetie'? Really? That's the best you've got? You're like a walking cliche. And @universal-airport, thanks for having my back, dude. It's nice to see someone else calling out this troll for what they are."

logs.name: noisy-voxel
logs.text: "@corn-rail, I'm not even going to bother responding to your personal attacks, because it's clear you're just trying to deflect from the fact that you got called out for spreading misinformation. If you can't handle a little criticism, then maybe you shouldn't be posting here. And by the way, I'm not'sucking up' to the mods, I'm just trying to have a respectful conversation. You're the one who's always trying to stir up drama and get people banned. Get over yourself."

logs.name: auburn-teapot
logs.text: "Can we please take a step back and focus on the original topic at hand? I'm tired of seeing these personal attacks and insults being thrown around. As a journalist, I value respectful discussion and fact-based arguments. Let's try to keep the conversation civil and productive, shall we?"

logs.name: glad-mullet
logs.text: "@auburn-teapot, thank you for trying to bring some sanity to this conversation. I'm with you, let's please get back on topic and leave the personal attacks behind. @corn-rail, if you can't handle a little criticism, then maybe you should take a step back and reflect on why you're so defensive. And @noisy-voxel, I got your back, dude. Let's keep it real and keep it respectful."
